# Scholarship Discovery

List all scholarships, fellowships, and funding opportunities available to Indian students pursuing MS programs in Marketing Analytics or Management Analytics at US universities starting January 2027.

**Target schools:** Rochester, Rutgers, NYU, CUNY Baruch

**Include:**
- University-specific scholarships
- External scholarships open to Indian nationals
- Assistantship opportunities
- Deadlines and eligibility criteria
